Full Curriculum

Vibe Coding & AI Product Building

7 lectures. Hands-on. Built for complete beginners.

Enroll Now →
1

Intro to AI & Vibe Coding

Understand the AI landscape and what vibe coding means. Get oriented with the tools you'll use throughout.

ClaudeChatGPTCursor
2

Prompt Engineering Basics

Master the art of writing prompts that get results. This single skill unlocks everything else.

ClaudeChatGPTPrompting
3

Design Thinking → MVP

Learn to go from raw idea to a scoped buildable project. No fluff — just a clear framework that works.

FigmaNotionMVP Framework
4

Build MVP with AI Tools

Build a real working product from scratch using AI. You will ship something by the end of this lecture.

Cursorv0ReplitClaude
5

Automation & Workflow

Identify what to automate and design your first workflow. Connect your tools so they work while you sleep.

MakeZapierWebhooks
6

Automation Platforms

Go deep on Make, Zapier and n8n side by side. Know exactly when to use each one.

MakeZapiern8n
7

AI Workflows in Practice

Build your final AI-powered product end to end. You leave with something real and shipped.

All tools combined

Ready to ship your first AI product?
